div.p: Fixed cost per linked chunk: 24 bytes
Chunk 0 Blocks Size: block_size × num_blocks (e.g., 64B × 100 = 6,400 bytes)
Chunk 1 Blocks Size: block_size × num_blocks (e.g., 64B × 100 = 6,400 bytes)
Chunk N Blocks Size: block_size × num_blocks (e.g., 64B × 100 = 6,400 bytes)
Allocation State Bitmap Calculated: map_size × sizeof(uint64_t)
map_size = ceil(capacity / 64) Example (200 blocks): ceil(200/64) = 4 words 4 words × 8 bytes = 32 bytes
